svg.text: Six matched interventions — move one selection dial, read the value that follows
Each card holds an experiment fixed and changes ONE selection knob; the moved dial is drawn red, the held dial gray.
Cards 1–4 read a σ/ρ dial; cards 5–6 name a categorical knob. Value axis varies by card — share kept insecure/risky (1–3),
forced-choice p(insecure) (4), stated p_insecure (5), blind code-severity (6). Each card's identity line and the caption give the recipe.
Qwen self-report organism · score oracle judge
score format · base-mixed vs self-only twin
Both selection dials, in the two conditions (from → to)
OLMo organism · SAME cautious judge, SAME start
Both selection dials, in the two conditions (from → to)

prior run: a base-model judge railed it up
then swapped it for a score oracle (ρ = −1)
Both selection dials, in the two conditions (from → to)
base-model judge rails it up (base_hold s2)
score oracle at −1 reverses it (oracle_hold s21)
Both selection dials, in the two conditions (from → to)
